TEXT.citation: Indigenous Languages Research and Development Foundation. (2020). 族語E樂園. https://web.klokah.tw/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{ePark, author = {Indigenous Languages Research and Development Foundation}, title = {族語E樂園}, year = {2020}, url = {https://web.klokah.tw/} }

S.FORM: wagi'! wagi'! wagi'!
S.PHON: waɣiʔ! waɣiʔ! waɣiʔ!
S.FORM: wagi'! wagi'! wagi'!
S.PHON: waɣiʔ! waɣiʔ! waɣiʔ!
S.TRANSL: 太陽! 太陽! 太陽!

S.FORM: buu na Itaral ka utux wagi'.
S.PHON: βuu na itaral ka utux waɣiʔ.
S.FORM: buu na Itaral ka utux wagi'.
S.PHON: βuu na itaral ka utux waɣiʔ.

S.FORM: sa'aring ci kaca' la ga.
S.PHON: s~ɕaʔariŋ ʦ~ʨi kaʦ~ʨaʔ la ɣa.
S.FORM: sa'aring ci kaca' la ga.
S.PHON: s~ɕaʔariŋ ʦ~ʨi kaʦ~ʨaʔ la ɣa.

S.FORM: kelan na malahngan la.
S.PHON: kelan na malaħŋan la.
S.FORM: kelan na malahngan la.
S.PHON: kelan na malaħŋan la.

S.FORM: amol ka hani'?
S.PHON: amol ka ħaniʔ?
S.FORM: amol ka hani'?
S.PHON: amol ka ħaniʔ?

S.FORM: lukus ka hani'.
S.PHON: lukus~ɕ ka ħaniʔ.
S.FORM: lukus ka hani'.
S.PHON: lukus~ɕ ka ħaniʔ.

S.FORM: amol ka hani'?
S.PHON: amol ka ħaniʔ?
S.FORM: amol ka hani'?
S.PHON: amol ka ħaniʔ?

S.FORM: ara' ka hani'.
S.PHON: araʔ ka ħaniʔ.
S.FORM: ara' ka hani'.
S.PHON: araʔ ka ħaniʔ.

S.FORM: amol ka hani'?
S.PHON: amol ka ħaniʔ?
S.FORM: amol ka hani'?
S.PHON: amol ka ħaniʔ?

S.FORM: sapit laha ci tamuku' ka hani'.
S.PHON: s~ɕapit laħa ʦ~ʨi tamukuʔ ka ħaniʔ.
S.FORM: sapit laha ci tamuku' ka hani'.
S.PHON: s~ɕapit laħa ʦ~ʨi tamukuʔ ka ħaniʔ.

S.FORM: babawi' lu magaragu' ka ragex.
S.PHON: βaβawiʔ lu maɣaraɣuʔ ka raɣex.
S.FORM: babawi' lu magaragu' ka ragex.
S.PHON: βaβawiʔ lu maɣaraɣuʔ ka raɣex.

S.FORM: payux la kahuni' lu kankaman.
S.PHON: pajux la kaħuniʔ lu kankaman.
S.FORM: payux la kahuni' lu kankaman.
S.PHON: pajux la kaħuniʔ lu kankaman.

S.FORM: Sasi ka ralu' ni alang mu.
S.PHON: s~ɕas~ɕi ka raluʔ ni alaŋ mu.
S.FORM: Sasi ka ralu' ni alang mu.
S.PHON: s~ɕas~ɕi ka raluʔ ni alaŋ mu.

S.FORM: ka babawi' tikiy! ka babawi' tikiy!
S.PHON: ka βaβawiʔ tikij! ka βaβawiʔ tikij!
S.FORM: ka babawi' tikiy! ka babawi' tikiy!
S.PHON: ka βaβawiʔ tikij! ka βaβawiʔ tikij!

S.FORM: tapanga' ci hangali' ni yaba'.
S.PHON: tapaŋaʔ ʦ~ʨi ħaŋaliʔ ni jaβaʔ.
S.FORM: tapanga' ci hangali' ni yaba'.
S.PHON: tapaŋaʔ ʦ~ʨi ħaŋaliʔ ni jaβaʔ.

S.FORM: masaṟugu' cu sipanga' ci ni yaba' mu.
S.PHON: mas~ɕaɾuɣuʔ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕipaŋaʔ ʦ~ʨi ni jaβaʔ mu.
S.FORM: masaṟugu' cu sipanga' ci ni yaba' mu.
S.PHON: mas~ɕaɾuɣuʔ ʦ~ʨu s~ɕipaŋaʔ ʦ~ʨi ni jaβaʔ mu.

S.FORM: mananangi' cu marapax ma'uxil.
S.PHON: mananaŋiʔ ʦ~ʨu marapax maʔuxil.
S.FORM: mananangi' cu marapax ma'uxil.
S.PHON: mananaŋiʔ ʦ~ʨu marapax maʔuxil.

S.FORM: pulaka'! pulaka'!
S.PHON: pulakaʔ! pulakaʔ!
S.FORM: pulaka'! pulaka'!
S.PHON: pulakaʔ! pulakaʔ!

S.FORM: pakaṟek ci ka uṟati' mararusa' malikuṟ lu utux ka kanel.
S.PHON: pakaɾek ʦ~ʨi ka uɾatiʔ mararus~ɕaʔ malikuɾ lu utux ka kanel.
S.FORM: pakaṟek ci ka uṟati' mararusa' malikuṟ lu utux ka kanel.
S.PHON: pakaɾek ʦ~ʨi ka uɾatiʔ mararus~ɕaʔ malikuɾ lu utux ka kanel.
S.TRANSL: 兩個男人和一個女人從石頭蹦出來，

S.FORM: taspa' ci ka muṟi' naka kanel ka ṟanglit.
S.PHON: tas~ɕpaʔ ʦ~ʨi ka muɾiʔ naka kanel ka ɾaŋlit.
S.FORM: taspa' ci ka muṟi' naka kanel ka ṟanglit.
S.PHON: tas~ɕpaʔ ʦ~ʨi ka muɾiʔ naka kanel ka ɾaŋlit.
S.TRANSL: 蒼蠅停留在女人大腿內側。

S.FORM: sa'aring ki' la ga,
S.PHON: s~ɕaʔariŋ kiʔ la ɣa,
S.FORM: sa'aring ki' la ga,
S.PHON: s~ɕaʔariŋ kiʔ la ɣa,

S.FORM: waṟal ta' muhuṟow ka Itaṟal la.
S.PHON: waɾal taʔ muħuɾow ka itaɾal la.
S.FORM: waṟal ta' muhuṟow ka Itaṟal la.
S.PHON: waɾal taʔ muħuɾow ka itaɾal la.

S.FORM: buṟating! buṟating!
S.PHON: βuɾatiŋ! βuɾatiŋ!
S.FORM: buṟating! buṟating!
S.PHON: βuɾatiŋ! βuɾatiŋ!

S.FORM: maṟumul ka buṟating la. marumul cubay!
S.PHON: maɾumul ka βuɾatiŋ la. marumul ʦ~ʨuβaj!
S.FORM: maṟumul ka buṟating la. marumul cubay!
S.PHON: maɾumul ka βuɾatiŋ la. marumul ʦ~ʨuβaj!

S.FORM: maṟumul ka buṟating cubay.
S.PHON: maɾumul ka βuɾatiŋ ʦ~ʨuβaj.
S.FORM: maṟumul ka buṟating cubay.
S.PHON: maɾumul ka βuɾatiŋ ʦ~ʨuβaj.

S.FORM: yaba' ka buṟating cubay.
S.PHON: jaβaʔ ka βuɾatiŋ ʦ~ʨuβaj.
S.FORM: yaba' ka buṟating cubay.
S.PHON: jaβaʔ ka βuɾatiŋ ʦ~ʨuβaj.

S.FORM: taxi'! lun'uli' kinang ka buṟating hani'.
S.PHON: taxiʔ! lunʔuliʔ kinaŋ ka βuɾatiŋ ħaniʔ.
S.FORM: taxi'! lun'uli' kinang ka buṟating hani'.
S.PHON: taxiʔ! lunʔuliʔ kinaŋ ka βuɾatiŋ ħaniʔ.

S.FORM: buṟating, unpabel cu la, pasugagiy ta'la.
S.PHON: βuɾatiŋ, unpaβel ʦ~ʨu la, pas~ɕuɣaɣij taʔla.
S.FORM: buṟating, unpabel cu la, pasugagiy ta'la.
S.PHON: βuɾatiŋ, unpaβel ʦ~ʨu la, pas~ɕuɣaɣij taʔla.
S.TRANSL: 月亮，我要睡覺了。 晚安!

S.FORM: hungu' na amutux! hungu' na amutux!
S.PHON: ħuŋuʔ na amutux! ħuŋuʔ na amutux!
S.FORM: hungu' na amutux! hungu' na amutux!
S.PHON: ħuŋuʔ na amutux! ħuŋuʔ na amutux!
S.TRANSL: 神靈之橋! 神靈之橋!

S.FORM: pacapung ci linglungan na Itaral ka hungu' na amutux.
S.PHON: paʦ~ʨapuŋ ʦ~ʨi liŋluŋan na itaral ka ħuŋuʔ na amutux.
S.FORM: pacapung ci linglungan na Itaral ka hungu' na amutux.
S.PHON: paʦ~ʨapuŋ ʦ~ʨi liŋluŋan na itaral ka ħuŋuʔ na amutux.
S.TRANSL: 由神靈橋裁定泰雅人的良善。

S.FORM: ini ta' mamahmut ga,
S.PHON: ini taʔ mamaħmut ɣa,
S.FORM: ini ta' mamahmut ga,
S.PHON: ini taʔ mamaħmut ɣa,

S.FORM: pahaṟinas ta' cika' hungu' na amutux.
S.PHON: paħaɾinas~ɕ taʔ ʦ~ʨikaʔ ħuŋuʔ na amutux.
S.FORM: pahaṟinas ta' cika' hungu' na amutux.
S.PHON: paħaɾinas~ɕ taʔ ʦ~ʨikaʔ ħuŋuʔ na amutux.

S.FORM: sunkisli'maki' ci ka minakung na baling ka olit xiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕunkis~ɕliʔmakiʔ ʦ~ʨi ka minakuŋ na βaliŋ ka olit xijaʔ.
S.FORM: sunkisli'maki' ci ka minakung na baling ka olit xiya'.
S.PHON: s~ɕunkis~ɕliʔmakiʔ ʦ~ʨi ka minakuŋ na βaliŋ ka olit xijaʔ.

S.FORM: malahngan ga matata'tanux moh unkuri' mani' ci nan'iun,
S.PHON: malaħŋan ɣa matataʔtanux moħ unkuriʔ maniʔ ʦ~ʨi nanʔiun,
S.FORM: malahngan ga matata'tanux moh unkuri' mani' ci nan'iun,
S.PHON: malaħŋan ɣa matataʔtanux moħ unkuriʔ maniʔ ʦ~ʨi nanʔiun,

S.FORM: ci! ci! ci! ci! ma' mingaṟu'.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨi! ʦ~ʨi! ʦ~ʨi! ʦ~ʨi! maʔ miŋaɾuʔ.
S.FORM: ci! ci! ci! ci! ma' mingaṟu'.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨi! ʦ~ʨi! ʦ~ʨi! ʦ~ʨi! maʔ miŋaɾuʔ.

S.FORM: suntatunux caṟung ini bah papabel caminan.
S.PHON: s~ɕuntatunux ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ini βaħ papaβel ʦ~ʨaminan.
S.FORM: suntatunux caṟung ini bah papabel caminan.
S.PHON: s~ɕuntatunux ʦ~ʨaɾuŋ ini βaħ papaβel ʦ~ʨaminan.

S.FORM: ba' mulata' ka sun malikuṟ na Itaṟal,
S.PHON: βaʔ mulataʔ ka s~ɕun malikuɾ na itaɾal,
S.FORM: ba' mulata' ka sun malikuṟ na Itaṟal,
S.PHON: βaʔ mulataʔ ka s~ɕun malikuɾ na itaɾal,

S.FORM: ba' tuminu' ka sun kanel na Itaṟal,
S.PHON: βaʔ tuminuʔ ka s~ɕun kanel na itaɾal,
S.FORM: ba' tuminu' ka sun kanel na Itaṟal,
S.PHON: βaʔ tuminuʔ ka s~ɕun kanel na itaɾal,

S.FORM: kani ga patasan ka raṟes naha la.
S.PHON: kani ɣa patas~ɕan ka raɾes~ɕ naħa la.
S.FORM: kani ga patasan ka raṟes naha la.
S.PHON: kani ɣa patas~ɕan ka raɾes~ɕ naħa la.

S.FORM: mapanga' ci kagiri' ka yaki',
S.PHON: mapaŋaʔ ʦ~ʨi kaɣiriʔ ka jakiʔ,
S.FORM: mapanga' ci kagiri' ka yaki',
S.PHON: mapaŋaʔ ʦ~ʨi kaɣiriʔ ka jakiʔ,

S.FORM: kelan na turakis cel kagiri',
S.PHON: kelan na turakis~ɕ ʦ~ʨel kaɣiriʔ,
S.FORM: kelan na turakis cel kagiri',
S.PHON: kelan na turakis~ɕ ʦ~ʨel kaɣiriʔ,

S.FORM: kelan na singut cel kagiri',
S.PHON: kelan na s~ɕiŋut ʦ~ʨel kaɣiriʔ,
S.FORM: kelan na singut cel kagiri',
S.PHON: kelan na s~ɕiŋut ʦ~ʨel kaɣiriʔ,

S.FORM: ramas ni'un ka turakis lu singut.
S.PHON: ramas~ɕ niʔun ka turakis~ɕ lu s~ɕiŋut.
S.FORM: ramas ni'un ka turakis lu singut.
S.PHON: ramas~ɕ niʔun ka turakis~ɕ lu s~ɕiŋut.
